## Scope

Describe the user-visible or operational change. State `N/A` when this is not
applicable.

## Validation

List commands, tests, or manual checks run and their results.

## Tracking

Link the GitHub issue.

## Validation and release impact

Describe any validation/configuration impact and select the applicable release
label. State `N/A` when neither applies.

## Security considerations

Describe relevant security or privacy implications, or state `N/A`.
